title: lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. glandulifera
intro: Lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. glandulifera is a plant species within the family Caprifoliaceae, commonly known as the honeysuckle family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. glandulifera include reducing fever and alleviating coughs, as well as its use as a treatment for various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea or using the plant's extracts in the form of capsules or tinctures.
